title: FX Trading Analyst Trainee
description:
Company: Intellective Capital

Location: 143 Cecil Street | 03-01, GB Building | Singapore 069542

Employment Type: Traineeship (6 months)

Allowance: SGD 2,400 per month (government-subsidised under the GRIT programme)

Job Summary:

We are seeking a motivated FX Trading Analyst Trainee for a structured 6-month Graduate Industry Traineeship under Singapore’s GRIT programme. You will gain hands-on experience in foreign exchange markets, market analysis, trade support, and risk management, while being mentored by experienced professionals in our FX team.

Key Responsibilities:

• Assist with FX market research and daily market briefs

• Support execution workflows and trade documentation

• Monitor economic data and key drivers impacting currency markets

• Participate in strategy discussions and analytical tasks

• Complete a mini independent project and regular performance reviews

Training & Development:

This traineeship provides structured on-the-job training, regular mentorship sessions, and clear performance milestones to build competence in FX markets and trading operations.

Requirements:

• Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident

• Fresh graduate (Class of 2024/2025) with a relevant degree (e.g., Finance, Economics, Business, Mathematics)

• Strong interest in financial markets, analytics, and trading

• Good communication, analytical and teamwork skills

How to Apply:

Please submit your application through MyCareersFuture. Only candidates eligible under the GRIT programme will be considered.

postedCompany.description:
Intellective Capital is an independent, research driven and client focused Asset Management firm headquartered in Singapore.

It is registered with and regulated by Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS).

The firm is founded and led by senior professionals from Banking & Financial services industry, having gained extensive experience

and expertise in some of the most reputed global financial institutions in areas of Wealth & Investment Management, Capital Markets,

Investment Banking & Portfolio Management. With combined experience of more than 50 years and extensive network of relationships,

Intellective Capital is well positioned to offer best in class solutions to help clients navigate through today’s complex and volatile markets.

From its base in Asia, Intellective Capital serves private clients and institutions as investment manager and advisor.

It manages large pool of capital allocated across Equities, Fixed Income & Alternative assets in public and private markets.
postedCompany.name: INTELLECTIVE CAPITAL PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
